endpoints.name: Get information about your account
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BROWSHOT_API_KEY}} with your BROWSHOT API KEY.

endpoints.name: Requests thousands of screenshtos at once
endpoints.description: Get hundreds or thousands of screenshots from a text file. You can use this API call or the dashboard. Unlike the other API calls, you must issue a POST request with the Content-Type "multipart/form-data" in order to upload the text file. The text file must contain the list of URLs to request, 1 URL per line. Failed screenshots will be tried up to 3 times before giving up.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BROWSHOT_API_KEY}} with your BROWSHOT API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get the batch status
endpoints.description: Get the status of a batch requested through the API or through the dashboard.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BROWSHOT_API_KEY}} with your BROWSHOT API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get information about a browser
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BROWSHOT_API_KEY}} with your BROWSHOT API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get all browsers
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BROWSHOT_API_KEY}} with your BROWSHOT API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get information about an instance
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BROWSHOT_API_KEY}} with your BROWSHOT API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get all instances
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BROWSHOT_API_KEY}} with your BROWSHOT API KEY.

endpoints.name: Request a screenshot
endpoints.description:
Screenshots requests to private and shared instances require a positive balance.

*IMPORTANT*: Remember that you can only do 100 free screenshots per month. To used a premium instance, use instance_id=65 for example.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BROWSHOT_API_KEY}} with your BROWSHOT API KEY.

endpoints.name: Delete screenshot data
endpoints.description: You can delete details of your screenshots to remove any confidential information.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BROWSHOT_API_KEY}} with your BROWSHOT API KEY.

endpoints.name: Host thumbnails on your own S3 account or on Browshot.
endpoints.description: You can host screenshots and thumbnails on your own S3 account or on Browshot.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BROWSHOT_API_KEY}} with your BROWSHOT API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get the HTML code
endpoints.description: Retrieve the HTML code of the rendered page. This API call should be used when html=1 was specified in the screenshot request.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BROWSHOT_API_KEY}} with your BROWSHOT API KEY.

endpoints.name: Query screenshot status
endpoints.description: Once a screenshot has been requested, its status must be checked until it is either "error" or "finished".
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BROWSHOT_API_KEY}} with your BROWSHOT API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get information about screenshots
endpoints.description: Get information about the last 100 screenshots requested.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BROWSHOT_API_KEY}} with your BROWSHOT API KEY.

endpoints.name: Request multiple screenshots
endpoints.description:
Request multiple screenshots in one API call. The API call accepts all the parameters supported by screenshot/create.
You can specify up to 10 URLs and 10 instances for a total of 100 screenshots in one API call.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BROWSHOT_API_KEY}} with your BROWSHOT API KEY.

endpoints.name: Search for screenshots
endpoints.description: Search for screenshots of a specific URL.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BROWSHOT_API_KEY}} with your BROWSHOT API KEY.

endpoints.name: Share a screenshot
endpoints.description: You can make your screenshots public, add notes, and share it with your friends and colleagues. Only screenshots which are successfully completed can be shared.n the thumbnail. You can take a 1024x768 screenshot, crop it to 768x768, and get it scaled down to 300x300.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BROWSHOT_API_KEY}} with your BROWSHOT API KEY.

endpoints.name: Retrieve a thumbnail image
endpoints.description:
Unlike the other API calls, this API sends back the thumbnail as a PNG file, not JSON. The HTTP response code indicates whether the screenshot was successful (200), or incomplete (404) or failed (404). If the screenshot failed or is not finished, a default image "Not found" is sent.

You can crop your screenshots. The crop is done first, then the thumbnail. You can take a 1024x768 screenshot, crop it to 768x768, and get it scaled down to 300x300.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BROWSHOT_API_KEY}} with your BROWSHOT API KEY.
